reviews.comment:
el cajero alto de turno noche es un forro, el que cocina las papas. también,. 0 onda de laburar las papas mas aburridas de mi vida pero a esta hora no hay otra cosa asi q ya fue y estan ricas

(Translated by Google)
The tall cashier on night shift is a jerk, and the one who cooks the fries too. It's not like working. The fries are the most boring thing I've ever had, but at this hour there's nothing else to do, so I've had it, and they're delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMHFud0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
